meta.title: Bishvileinu — Memory Builds Life
meta.description: Bishvileinu connects Jewish communities around the world with memorial initiatives in Israel founded by the bereaved families of those who fell in the Swords of Iron War. Matching, guidance, shared growth.
meta.og_description: Bridging remembrance in Israel with communities worldwide — a shared path of memory, resilience and growth.

jsonld_description: An initiative connecting the remembrance of those who fell in the Swords of Iron War with Jewish communities worldwide — matching, guidance and shared growth.

footer.tagline: Memory builds life — connecting the remembrance of our nation's heroes with Jewish communities around the world.
footer.copyright: Bishvileinu · Memory Builds Life · Registered nonprofit (R.A. —)

hero.label: Initiative
hero.title: Memory builds life
hero.lead: A bridge between remembrance in Israel and Jewish communities worldwide — matching, guidance, and shared growth out of pain.

manifesto.label: For them · For us
manifesto.l3: They did it for our sake.

stats.label: Since October 7th
stats.title: The toll of the War of Revival
stats.lead: The Swords of Iron War left deep bereavement — and with it, thousands of stories of courage, love, and the choice to grow.
stats.s1: fronts of fighting, with the help of hundreds of thousands of reserve soldiers
stats.s2: IDF soldiers fell in the campaign for the survival of the state
stats.s3: Israelis fell during the Swords of Iron War

alt.sprout: A sprout growing from scorched earth — a symbol of growth out of pain
alt.olive: A group planting olive trees — a memorial initiative

growth.label: In Israel
growth.title: Out of the rupture, the choice to grow
growth.lead: Many bereaved families chose to remember and to create new life. They founded dozens of living-memory initiatives — each making Israel a better place.

who.label: Who we are
who.title: The bridge between memory and communities
who.lead: The Bishvileinu initiative was created to build the bridge between memorial projects in Israel and Jewish communities around the world.
who.c1_text: We match a memorial initiative with a community, and accompany the bond from the first meeting to a lasting partnership.
who.c2_text: Precise connection, educational materials, and subsidy of the encounter — so the partnership begins and endures.
who.c3_text: We strengthen the identity and resilience of communities, and build stronger bridges between world Jewry and Israel.

impact.label: Your impact
impact.title: A gift that becomes a path
impact.lead: Every amount touches people directly — here's how.
impact.i1_text: An educational kit for a class on the story of a fallen soldier
impact.i2_text: A memorial encounter between a bereaved family and a community
impact.i3_text: Subsidizing a delegation's visit to a memorial initiative in Israel

router.label: Choose your path
router.title: Which path do you belong to?
router.lead: Every audience has its own path — choose, and we'll lead the way.
router.p1_desc: Schools, synagogues, federations and Jewish organizations that want to join the path and adopt a memorial initiative.
router.p2_desc: Bereaved families and memorial initiatives that want to widen the circle of remembrance and connect with communities worldwide.
router.p3_desc: Individuals and organizations that want to support and expand the initiative to more communities around the world.

cta.label: Not only your children — but your builders
cta.title: Let us reach out, join in, and widen the circle of action
cta.text: For them and for us — because memory is the bridge.
